title: Walking My Baby Back Home
writer: Don McGuire, Oscar Brodney, Lenny Bruce
actors: Donald O'Connor, Janet Leigh, Buddy Hackett
plot: World War II veteran Clarence "Jigger" Millard forms a band with several other former GIs. The band fails to take off and he is forced to join a minstrel show headed by Colonel Wallace. He soon falls for Wallace's niece Chris Hall.
